answers.answer: Inline #[cfg(test)] modules co-located with source. For cross-module tests, use crates/cclab-mamba/tests/ integration tests. Both are needed.
Rust #[test] in crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/stdlib/{module}_mod.rs as inline #[cfg(test)] modules. Test each mb_* function directly with MbValue inputs/outputs.
This change covers runtime, lower, resolve, and stdlib top-10. Parser/types/codegen/lexer are lower priority — defer to follow-up. Focus on zero-coverage modules first.
Out of scope. Coverage tooling (cargo-llvm-cov) setup is separate. This change just adds test files.
All XFAIL already resolved in previous changes (0 remaining). No action needed here.
